step.title: Finalize and Handoff
step.goal: Write the locked Structure Outline into the ticket body, stamp last_updated, re-validate, present handoff to ticket-plan.

substep.title: Write Structure Outline to Worklog
substep.action:
Append the Structure Outline to the worklog file. Use the Edit tool. Heading: "## Structure Outline" (level 2). Placement: AFTER the Design Summary section in the worklog.
The worklog journal now reads: - Orient Summary (from ticket-orient) - Q↔R Readiness Summary (from ticket-grill) - Design Summary (from ticket-design) - Structure Outline (from this skill) - (later: Writing Plan and Verify Session)

substep.title: Stamp last_updated
substep.action: uv run {base_dir}/scripts/stamp-frontmatter.py --file "{{worklog_path}}" --note "S-phase complete; Structure Outline locked. Shape: {{shape_mode}}, sections: {{count}}, Parts: {{use_parts}}."

check.action: Halt. Surface validation errors. Do NOT auto-fix.

substep.title: Present Final Handoff

section.title: Status remains 'draft'
section.description: Like all phases before Verify, this skill leaves the ticket at status=draft. Only ticket-verify's final step transitions to 'ready'.

section.title: The Structure Outline is read by downstream skills
section.description:
- ticket-plan reads the section list to plan writing order and subagent batching - ticket-write reads the section list to know what to fill - ticket-verify checks the final ticket against the outline (every outlined section should be present, non-empty, and honor its scope note)
Changes to the outline after this point trigger ticket-verify findings — keep the outline locked from here forward unless a downstream skill explicitly loops back.
